2605.12487.title: Task-Adaptive Embedding Refinement via Test-time LLM Guidance
2605.12487.paper_summary: We explore the effectiveness of an LLM-guided query refinement paradigm for extending the usability of embedding models to challenging zero-shot search and classification tasks. Our approach refines the embedding representation of a user query using feedback from a generative LLM on a small set of documents, enabling embeddings to adapt in real time to the target task. We conduct extensive experiments with state-of-the-art text embedding models across a diverse set of challenging search and classification benchmarks. Empirical results indicate that LLM-guided query refinement yields consistent gains across all models and datasets, with relative improvements of up to +25% in literature search, intent detection, key-point matching, and nuanced query-instruction following. The refined queries improve ranking quality and induce clearer binary separation across the corpus, enabling the embedding space to better reflect the nuanced, task-specific constraints of each ad-hoc user query. Importantly, this expands the range of practical settings in which embedding models can be effectively deployed, making them a compelling alternative when costly LLM pipelines are not viable at corpus-scale. We release our experimental code for reproducibility, at https://github.com/IBM/task-aware-embedding-refinement.
2605.12487.paper_summary_zh: 我們探討了一種由LLM引導的查詢精煉範式的有效性，以擴展嵌入模型在挑戰性零樣本搜索和分類任務中的可用性。<lb/>我們的方法利用來自生成性LLM對一小組文檔的反饋，精煉用戶查詢的嵌入表示，使嵌入能夠實時適應目標任務。<lb/>我們在多樣化的挑戰性搜索和分類基準上，對最先進的文本嵌入模型進行了廣泛的實驗。<lb/>實證結果表明，LLM引導的查詢精煉在所有模型和數據集上都產生了一致的增益，在文獻搜索、意圖檢測、關鍵點匹配和細緻查詢指令跟隨方面的相對改善高達+25%。<lb/>精煉後的查詢提高了排名質量，並在語料庫中引發了更清晰的二元分離，使嵌入空間更好地反映每個臨時用戶查詢的細緻、任務特定的約束。<lb/>重要的是，這擴展了嵌入模型可以有效部署的實際設置範圍，當高成本的LLM管道在語料庫規模上不可行時，使它們成為一種有吸引力的替代方案。<lb/>我們釋放了我們的實驗代碼以便於重現，網址為 https://github.com/IBM/task-aware-embedding-refinement。
2605.12487.author: Ariel Gera et.al.
2605.12487.authors: Ariel Gera, Shir Ashury-Tahan, Gal Bloch, Ohad Eytan, Assaf Toledo
